title: koehneago caripensis
intro: Koehneago caripensis, also known as the Mexican silver top, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koehneago caripensis include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves.
